purpose: Evaluate Codex-specific Skill routing and reviewed Goal draft contract quality without activating or executing the Goal.

metrics.trigger: deterministic routing accuracy; critical-case failures listed separately
metrics.quality: deterministic check pass rate plus blind 8-axis manual review when performed
metrics.comparison: paired descriptive deltas only; no statistical significance claim

repetition_policy: Cases marked critical use n=3 when provider access and budget permit; all others use the case-declared n. A smaller run is labeled partial.
revision_rule: A failure is immutable initial authority. Diagnose, revise policy, commit, and rerun cleanly under a new manifest; never overwrite or reinterpret the initial run.
manual_review: Only subjective rubric axes may use blind human/model review. Blinding keys are generated after outputs and condition labels are hidden until reviews are frozen.
